title: Floor Progression Guide
subtitle: MOVE FORWARD SMART
intro: This guide is meant to help players know when to stay, when to farm, and when to push ahead.
Think of it as a pacing guide instead of a giant floor encyclopedia.

sections.title: When To Move To The Next Floor
paragraphs: Move forward when your current floor feels controlled, not when it feels barely survivable.
If supplies, damage, and navigation still feel shaky, keep building stability first.

sections.title: Signs You Are Ready
items: Your current route feels safe and repeatable
You are not constantly running out of healing
You understand your build well enough to recover from mistakes
Your damage feels consistent instead of desperate

sections.title: SYSTEM WARNING
sections.text: Moving up too early can make the game feel harsher than it actually is.
